rationale: Educ. Code §12.118 governs evaluation of open-enrollment charter schools and has no operative connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict arises.
quote: The commissioner shall designate an impartial organization with experience in evaluating school choice programs to conduct an annual evaluation of open-enrollment charter schools.
_note: No textual or substantive relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and the charter school evaluation statute.
